'''Sullumun''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Sullust (star)|Sullust]] in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]]. Located in the [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with eighteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]].
